preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes:
v1.8.0: Competitor ad intelligence via Foreplay global discovery. New `competitor_spy` MCP tool pulls ads for any brand worldwide WITHOUT pre-subscribing to them in the Foreplay UI — the agent routes exclusively through /api/brand/getBrandsByDomain, getAdsByBrandId, getAdsByPageId, ad/duplicates, and ad/{id}. Fills the US-coverage gap that Meta Ads Library's EU-only preview restriction leaves open. Supports ad-media download (video/image → results/competitor-ads/<ad_id>.<ext>), ad-duplicate reverse lookup, cursor-based pagination, and credit-usage telemetry. BYOK — user supplies their own `foreplayApiKey` (0.01 credits per ad returned). Rate-limited via PreflightCheck (30/min, 500/hr, 5000/day). Bearer key banned from any direct outbound call via block-api-bypass.js — only the binary can touch public.api.foreplay.co. Static-source guards pin the no-Spyder contract (foreplay_test.go:TestForeplayOnlyGlobalDiscoveryEndpoints) — a future refactor that routes through /api/spyder/* fails the build.

v1.7.0: The big UX + resilience release. OAuth tokens now auto-refresh across every platform on a 4-hour Electron watchdog heartbeat plus a per-platform refresh loop in the Go core — no more reconnect every time a token expires. Every brand remembers its own conversation thread and paints prior history on reopen instead of a blank welcome. Morning briefing card summarizes ad performance, content, revenue, and a recommended next move at session start. Starter chips on both new and returning flows, Undo toast for ad kills, image-only Share, Ctrl/Cmd+D mic toggle, Ctrl/Cmd+S narrate-last, Lavender Pearl light mode with a titlebar sun/moon toggle, branded purple/green ad placeholders replacing the old gray broken-image stub, Stripe read-only revenue reporting, Reddit organic prospecting with a 7-layer compliance preflight, streaming TTS (first spoken word in ~400-700ms vs 2-3s), and a SaaS-grade rubric upgrade across every skill. Cold-start warmup is parallelized and pre-warms the SDK subprocess in the background so first-message latency drops from ~1-3s cold to immediate. Dashboard JSON parses are cached on the async hot path. Shopify now requests write_content and surfaces scope gaps as a reconnect prompt instead of a raw 403. Google Ads tiles stay green reliably across disconnect/reconnect cycles. Auto-claim referral on first launch. Under the hood: skill-routing migration from monolithic prose routers to 8 SKILLs loaded on demand (~53 KB off the cold-start context), monthly audit fail-loud on missing secrets, CI asar size ceiling, rate-limit preflight hardening via NextSlotNano, hook blocklist atomic-write siblings, framework-file protection so skill descriptions can't be hot-rewritten mid-session. Wisdom-api migrations now run once per isolate instead of per request.
whatsNew: Competitor ad intelligence via Foreplay: new `competitor_spy` MCP tool pulls ads for any competitor brand worldwide — no pre-subscribing required. Covers the US where Meta Ads Library previews are EU-only. Flow: brands-by-domain (acme.com → brand IDs) → ads-by-brand (all their ads, filterable by video/image/carousel, live/retired, longest-running) → download-ad (save creative to results/competitor-ads/). Also supports ad-duplicate reverse lookup (find every brand reusing a creative) and credit-usage telemetry. BYOK — supply your own Foreplay API key in Connections. Rate-limited, Bearer-key-vaulted, and statically guarded against ever drifting into Foreplay's Spyder endpoints (which would require manual brand subscription in the Foreplay UI).

Per-brand conversation threads: each brand keeps its own conversation history and paints the prior thread on reopen. Switch brands and the chat rehydrates to exactly where you left off — no more blank 'Welcome back — loading…' splash. Charset-guarded so non-ASCII brand names can't break thread lookup.

Morning briefing card at session start: summarizes ad performance, content published, revenue, and a recommended next move for the active brand. Dismisses after you've seen it; falls back gracefully when data is missing. Cached so it paints instantly.

OAuth auto-refresh across every platform: 4-hour Electron watchdog heartbeat plus a per-platform refresh loop in the Go binary (Meta, TikTok, Google, Klaviyo, Amazon, LinkedIn, Reddit, Stripe, Etsy). No more 'token expired' reconnect dialogs every hour. Refresh tokens are vaulted alongside access tokens.

Cold-start warmup: version label fires in background, main-process reads parallelize, and the Claude Agent SDK subprocess pre-warms while you're reading the welcome — first-message latency drops from ~1-3s cold to immediate on returning runs.

Lavender Pearl light mode + titlebar sun/moon toggle: persists your choice, applied before paint so there's no flash. New `--hover-*`/`--shadow-*` tokens removed the cyclic :root declarations that broke dark-mode gradients in v1.6.

Starter chips on new + returning flows: one-tap entry into the most common actions (connect a platform, make an ad, check dashboard). Contextual — different chips depending on whether you're first-run, mid-onboarding, or a power user.

Undo toast for ad kills + image-only Share: pause-by-mistake gets a 5-second undo window that actually un-pauses on all platforms it was running on. Share menu now supports image-only payloads (no caption forced in) for platforms that prefer a clean media post.
Hotkeys: Ctrl/Cmd+D toggles the mic, Ctrl/Cmd+S narrates the last Claude response. Tooltip-discoverable, ignore-when-typing-in-input semantics so they don't fight text entry.

Stripe read-only revenue reporting: seven new actions (stripe-login, stripe-setup, stripe-revenue, stripe-subscriptions, stripe-cohorts, stripe-analytics, stripe-preference). OAuth scope pinned to `read_only` in BOTH the binary (factory) and the Worker (echoed-scope re-verification). No write verbs in source — enforced by a build-failing test. When both Shopify and Stripe are connected, the new `revenueSourcePreference` config decides which drives the dashboard topline.

Reddit organic prospecting: four new actions — reddit-prospect-scan, reddit-prospect-draft, reddit-prospect-post, reddit-shadowban-check. Two-stage quality gate (structural + optional AI score) and a seven-layer compliance preflight (account age, karma, per-sub cadence, global cadence, 72h dedup, cached shadowban check) run BEFORE every /api/comment. `redditPostMode: "draft-only"` escape hatch for fresh accounts.

Streaming TTS: Claude's response feeds sentence-by-sentence as it streams, so synthesis starts on the first complete sentence. Time-to-first-word drops from ~2-3s to ~400-700ms. Short fragments coalesce to avoid choppy playback.

Branded ad placeholders: the gray broken-image stub that used to show up for ads still mid-generation is replaced with a purple/green radial-gradient placeholder showing the platform initial + ad-name preview. Looks native in both light and dark themes.

Shopify scope-gap handling: older Shopify tokens that predate a newly-requested scope (e.g. `write_content` shipping in this release) now surface as a reconnect prompt in the chat instead of a raw 403 error. The binary tags these specifically so the renderer can humanize them.

Google Ads tile stays green across disconnect/reconnect cycles. The `splitOAuthPersistFields` logic now always emits a vault placeholder in the brand config (even when the binary already redacted the token), so greenness no longer silently depends on global config inheritance — extracted to `app/oauth-persist.js` with 7 new unit tests pinning the behavior.

Auto-claim referral on first launch: when a user lands on the app via a referral link, the pending-ref claim now fires automatically on first launch (IP-keyed) and surfaces a toast confirming it applied. No more 'did my referral go through?' DMs.

Dashboard perf: JSON parses of common platform responses are cached on the async hot path. Wisdom-api worker now runs D1 schema migrations once per isolate instead of per request — noticeable drop in p95 ingest latency.

Rubric upgrade across every skill: enterprise-grade strategy depth added to merlin-ads, merlin-content, merlin-analytics, merlin-seo. Goal pacing, inventory sync, and scale-time gates are wired through the docs so Claude makes more grounded recommendations.

Skill-routing migration (from v1.6.0): /merlin delegates to 8 SKILLs loaded on demand by the Claude Agent SDK. Cold-start context drops ~53 KB; full skill bodies load only when a user utterance matches. Monthly routing-telemetry audit opens draft PRs when fallback rate exceeds 25%.

Framework-file protection: `.claude/skills/` is in both the inline settings.json hook blocklist and block-api-bypass.js PROTECTED_PATH_PATTERNS so rogue mid-session writes can't re-route user intent. Atomic-write siblings (.bak, .tmp, .tmp.N) are now part of every critical-file block pattern.

Security hardening: rate-limit preflight uses NextSlotNano monotonic slot reservation (fixes a same-platform parallel fan-out race). CI asar size ceiling guards against the v1.3.0 568 MB regression. Mobile approval queue stub (HMAC-signed) ships live for the Electron approval card.
